title: LLMNR/NBT-NS Poisoning and NTLMv2 Capture
description: This runbook operationalizes LLMNR/NBT-NS Poisoning and NTLMv2 Capture using #responder , #hashcat . It is designed for repeatable, high-signal execution in authorized OSCP/CPTS-style assessments. Captures NetNTLMv2 challenge responses and attempts offline cracking.

metadata.descriptionHtml:
This runbook operationalizes LLMNR/NBT-NS Poisoning and NTLMv2 Capture using #responder , #hashcat. It is designed for repeatable, high-signal execution in authorized OSCP/CPTS-style assessments.

Captures NetNTLMv2 challenge responses and attempts offline cracking.

  1. Prepare scope and access: validate target reachability and select low-noise execution order.
  2. Execute core workflow: run the command chain to produce actionable security outcomes.
  3. Validate and operationalize output: confirm results, capture artifacts, and prepare follow-on actions.
  • Tool Location/Source: primary references are in local source corpus entries linked from runbook-list.md; e.g., docs/sources-runbooks/oscp-cpts/p0/0x1ceKing-HTB-Certified-Penetration-Testing-Specialist/cheatsheet/Active Directory Enumeration and Attacks.md:23; docs/sources-runbooks/oscp-cpts/p0/0x1ceKing-HTB-Certified-Penetration-Testing-Specialist/cheatsheet/Active Directory Enumeration and Attacks.md:24.
  • Attack pre-requisite: authorized scope, operator shell access, and protocol reachability on TCP 80, TCP 443.
  • What attacker gain: validated findings (access paths, credentials, execution context, or exposure evidence) enabling faster compromise progression.
  • Detection/Defense opsec: monitor abnormal auth/enumeration bursts, enforce least privilege and hardening baselines, and alert on repeated tool-pattern telemetry.

Core Commands:

sudo responder -I <IFACE> -Pv
hashcat -m 5600 responder_hashes.txt /usr/share/wordlists/rockyou.txt
extraInfo: primary references are in local source corpus entries linked from runbook-list.md ; e.g., docs/sources-runbooks/oscp-cpts/p0/0x1ceKing-HTB-Certified-Penetration-Testing-Specialist/cheatsheet/Active Directory Enumeration and Attacks.md:23; docs/sources-runbooks/oscp-cpts/p0/0x1ceKing-HTB-Certified-Penetration-Testing-Specialist/cheatsheet/Active Directory Enumeration and Attacks.md:24 .
prerequisites: authorized scope, operator shell access, and protocol reachability on TCP 80 , TCP 443 .
attackerGains: validated findings (access paths, credentials, execution context, or exposure evidence) enabling faster compromise progression.
detectionNotes: monitor abnormal auth/enumeration bursts, enforce least privilege and hardening baselines, and alert on repeated tool-pattern telemetry.
